CustomField.description: Indicates the source of the transaction. For Manual Invoices display Invoice Category along with the Invoice Type. Prepayment functionality is already deprecated. Keeping the lookup to track historical prepayments
CustomField.formula: IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice__c),(IF(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c,'Other'),TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c)+'-'+TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Category__c),TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c))), IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payments_Credits__c),(IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payments_Credits__r.leaseworks__Payment_Type__c,'CN_Payment'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payments_Credits__r.leaseworks__Payment_Type__c,'Credit Memo Correction')),TEXT(leaseworks__Payments_Credits__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c)+'-'+'Credit',TEXT(leaseworks__Payments_Credits__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c))), IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Prepayment__c),'Payment', IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payables__c),IF(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payables__r.leaseworks__Payable_Type__c,'Rebate'),TEXT(leaseworks__Payables__r.leaseworks__Payable_Type__c) + ' - ' + TEXT(leaseworks__Payables__r.leaseworks__Related_Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c),TEXT(leaseworks__Payables__r.leaseworks__Payable_Type__c)), IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payouts__c),IF(leaseworks__Payouts__r.leaseworks__Payables_Type__c == 'Rebate',leaseworks__Payouts__r.leaseworks__Payables_Type__c + ' - ' + TEXT(leaseworks__Payouts__r.leaseworks__Related_Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c),leaseworks__Payouts__r.leaseworks__Payables_Type__c), IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Credit_Memo__c),'Credit Memo', IF(!ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payment_on_Account__c ),'Payment on Account','')))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates the source of the transaction. Eg : Invoice/Payment etc.
CustomField.label: Transaction Source
